title: Full regression validation and cleanup
description: The final gatekeeper for the sprint. Run every verification available — E2E suite, compilation, linting, manual smoke testing — and sweep the entire codebase for any remaining St Ann's-specific references that shouldn't be there. Fix any code issues found. Documentation updates are handled by WI-087 — this work item is purely about code correctness and completeness.
acceptance_criteria: make build-local succeeds with zero warnings
Full E2E suite passes: 146+ tests, 0 failures
Multi-club verification suite passes: 10+ tests, 0 failures
Codebase sweep confirms zero inappropriate St Ann's references in code:
- grep -r 'St Ann' internal/ returns only the normalize test cases
- grep -r 'stanns\|StAnns\|st_anns' internal/ templates/ returns zero results
No regressions in fixture display, team selection, matchup management, points, or Club Wrapped
Summary of all code changes made in this sprint captured for commit message / PR description

approach: 1. Run make build-local — fix any compilation errors
2. Run make lint — fix any linting issues introduced by the refactor
3. Run make test-e2e — capture results, fix any failures
4. Run multi-club test suite — capture results, fix any failures
5. Run codebase sweep greps — investigate and fix any remaining hardcoded references in source code
6. Manual smoke test: load dashboard, fixtures, teams, players, points, Club Wrapped — verify correct rendering
7. Prepare a summary of all changes for the sprint close

testing_requirements: This IS the testing — it's the final code validation gate
Sprint cannot be marked complete until both this WI and WI-087 pass

context.user_story: As the project owner, I need confidence that the refactor is complete and correct before this sprint is closed
